optimization_analysis.optimized_query:
# Optimized Federated Query using SERVICE clauses
# Each triple pattern is pushed to its most selective endpoint

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8897/sparql/
# Predicates: 8
#   <http://www.geonames.org/ontology#population> (http://www.geonames.org/ontology#Feature -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.3K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#lat> (http://www.geonames.org/ontology#Feature -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#lat> (http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Concept -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#long> (http://www.geonames.org/ontology#Feature -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#long> (http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Concept -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8K triples]

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8895/sparql/
# Predicates: 3
#   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Reaction -> http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Reaction) [7.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Drug -> http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Drug) [7.4K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Compound -> http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Compound) [13.9K triples]

optimized_federated_query:
# Smart Federated Query with UNION for Multiple Class Interpretations
# Each UNION branch uses different endpoints or predicates

SELECT DISTINCT ?NYTplace ?capital ?countryCode ?countryName ?ethnicGroup ?foundingDate ?geonameplace ?largestCity ?latitude ?longitude ?motto ?nationalAnthem ?population
WHERE {
  # Scenario 1: ?NYTplace=Feature, ?countryCode=Literal, ?countryName=Literal, ?population=Literal, ?latitude=Literal, ?longitude=Literal, ?geonameplace=Feature
  {
    SERVICE <http://localhost:8897/sparql/> {
      ?NYTplace <http://www.geonames.org/ontology#population> ?population . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?population:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.geonames.org/ontology#countryCode> ?countryCode . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?countryCode:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.geonames.org/ontology#name> ?countryName . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?countryName:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#lat> ?latitude . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?latitude:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#long> ?longitude . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?longitude:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> ?geonameplace . # ?NYTplace:Concept, ?geonameplace:Feature
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/anthem> ?nationalAnthem .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/capital> ?capital .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ethnicGroup> ?ethnicGroup .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundingDate> ?foundingDate .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/largestCity> ?largestCity .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/motto> ?motto .
    }
  }

  UNION

  # Scenario 2: ?NYTplace=Feature, ?countryCode=Literal, ?countryName=Literal, ?population=Literal, ?latitude=Literal, ?longitude=Literal, ?geonameplace=Drug
  {
    SERVICE <http://localhost:8895/sparql/> {
      ?NYTplace <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> ?geonameplace . # ?NYTplace:Drug, ?geonameplace:Drug
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/anthem> ?nationalAnthem .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/capital> ?capital .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ethnicGroup> ?ethnicGroup .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundingDate> ?foundingDate .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/largestCity> ?largestCity .
      ?geonameplace <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/motto> ?motto .
    }
    SERVICE <http://localhost:8897/sparql/> {
      ?NYTplace <http://www.geonames.org/ontology#population> ?population . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?population:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.geonames.org/ontology#countryCode> ?countryCode . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?countryCode:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.geonames.org/ontology#name> ?countryName . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?countryName:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#lat> ?latitude . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?latitude:Literal
      ?NYTplace <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#long> ?longitude . # ?NYTplace:Feature, ?longitude:Literal
    }
  }
}
LIMIT 1000
